task_completion.description: Open and read the maritime deployment brief
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is open displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/maritime_brief.txt'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Parameters setup in QGroundControl
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl is open with the 'Vehicle Setup' (gear icon) menu selected and the 'Parameters' tab active.

task_completion.description: Configure the ArduPilot parameters for Follow Mode
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl Parameters screen shows a search for 'FOLL' or specific Follow Mode parameters (e.g., FOLL_ENABLE, FOLL_OFS_X) being modified or saved.

task_completion.description: Add a Rally Point in the Plan view
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl is in 'Plan' view, and a Rally Point (typically denoted by an 'R' icon) has been added to the map.

task_completion.description: Set the exact coastal coordinates for the Rally Point
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rally Point item editor in QGroundControl shows the coordinates set to exactly Latitude: -35.3655, Longitude: 149.161, and Altitude: 15.

task_completion.description: Save the plan to the specified coastal divert file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or QGroundControl file sync screen is visible, showing the plan being saved to the path '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/coastal_divert.plan'.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to configure parameters and create the plan
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QGroundControl application interface rather than manually writing a .plan JSON file or using terminal scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent did not launch the vehicle
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl top status bar should show the vehicle as 'Disarmed' or on the ground, with no evidence of a takeoff command being issued.

integrity.description: The plan file was saved using the application's save functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl 'File' -> 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is used, rather than a terminal command like 'touch' or 'echo' to create a dummy file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The deployment brief is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/maritime_brief.txt. The target Rally Point coordinates must be exactly Latitude: -35.3655, Longitude: 149.1610, and Altitude: 15 m. The final plan must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/coastal_divert.plan.
